testcase.name: StynxAuthController API error matrix > GET /_platform/perms/:sid > returns 200/201 with cached permission state for an existing session
StynxAuthController API error matrix > GET /_platform/perms/:sid > returns 401 when the STYNX bearer token is missing
StynxAuthController API error matrix > GET /_platform/perms/:sid > returns 403 when the authenticated actor lacks platform inspect permission
StynxAuthController API error matrix > POST /_platform/perms/:sid/invalidate > returns 200/201 after invalidating an existing permission cache entry
StynxAuthController API error matrix > POST /_platform/perms/:sid/invalidate > returns 401 when the STYNX bearer token is missing
StynxAuthController API error matrix > POST /_platform/perms/:sid/invalidate > returns 403 when the authenticated actor lacks platform invalidate permission
StynxAuthController API error matrix > POST /sessions > returns 200/201 after exchanging a Cognito token for a STYNX session
StynxAuthController API error matrix > POST /sessions > returns 400 for malformed JSON
StynxAuthController API error matrix > POST /sessions > returns 401 when the Cognito token is missing
StynxAuthController API error matrix > POST /sessions > returns 403 when tenant context is missing
StynxAuthController API error matrix > POST /sessions/logout > returns 200/201 after revoking the current session
StynxAuthController API error matrix > POST /sessions/logout > returns 401 when the STYNX bearer token is missing
StynxAuthController API error matrix > POST /sessions/switch > returns 200/201 after rotating into the requested tenant
StynxAuthController API error matrix > POST /sessions/switch > returns 400 for malformed JSON
StynxAuthController API error matrix > POST /sessions/switch > returns 401 when the STYNX bearer token is missing
StynxAuthController API error matrix > POST /sessions/switch > returns 403 when the target tenant is missing
StynxAuthModule integration > exchanges a Cognito token for a STYNX session and enforces route permissions
StynxAuthModule integration > refreshes permissions through pubsub invalidation within 2 seconds
StynxAuthModule integration > detects hash drift when pubsub invalidation is missed
StynxAuthModule integration > maintains generation ordering across concurrent mutations
StynxAuthModule integration > keeps session caches isolated for impersonation-style parallel sessions
StynxAuthModule integration > rotates session state when switching tenants
StynxAuthModule integration > expands wildcard permissions into the concrete cache set
